mapper.sql: id, user_id, product_id, order_amount, unit_price_snapshot, tax_rate_snapshot, total_cost, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at
mapper.select: INSERT INTO orders ( id, user_id, product_id, order_amount, unit_price_snapshot, tax_rate_snapshot, total_cost, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderAmount}, #{unitPriceSnapshot}, #{taxRateSnapshot}, #{totalCost}, #{status}, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) RETURNING

SELECT
FROM orders WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false

SELECT
FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT count(1) FROM orders WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND is_deleted = false

WITH locked_product AS ( SELECT p.id, p.product_category_id, p.unit_price, p.is_deleted FROM products p WHERE p.id = #{productId} FOR UPDATE OF p ), locked_category AS ( SELECT pc.id, pc.tax_rate FROM product_categories pc JOIN locked_product p ON pc.id = p.product_category_id FOR UPDATE OF pc ), target_order AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN p.id IS NULL THEN 'PRODUCT_NOT_AVAILABLE' WHEN p.is_deleted = TRUE THEN 'PRODUCT_NOT_AVAILABLE' WHEN c.id IS NULL THEN 'CATEGORY_NOT_AVAILABLE' WHEN p.unit_price <> #{unitPriceSnapshot} THEN 'UNIT_PRICE_MISMATCH' WHEN c.tax_rate <> #{taxRateSnapshot} THEN 'TAX_RATE_MISMATCH' ELSE 'OK' END AS check_result FROM locked_product p FULL JOIN locked_category c ON c.id = p.product_category_id ), inserted_order AS ( INSERT INTO orders ( id, user_id, product_id, order_amount, unit_price_snapshot, tax_rate_snapshot, total_cost, status, is_deleted, created_at, updated_at ) SELECT #{id}, #{userId}, #{productId}, #{orderAmount}, #{unitPriceSnapshot}, #{taxRateSnapshot}, #{totalCost}, #{status}, false, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM target_order WHERE check_result = 'OK' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT check_result FROM target_order), 'PRODUCT_NOT_AVAILABLE')

WITH locked_order AS ( SELECT o.id, o.product_id, o.status, o.is_deleted FROM orders o WHERE o.id = #{id} FOR UPDATE OF o ), locked_product AS ( SELECT p.id, p.product_category_id, p.unit_price, p.is_deleted FROM products p JOIN locked_order o ON p.id = o.product_id FOR UPDATE OF p ), locked_category AS ( SELECT pc.id, pc.tax_rate FROM product_categories pc JOIN locked_product p ON pc.id = p.product_category_id FOR UPDATE OF pc ), target_order AS ( SELECT CASE WHEN o.id IS NULL THEN 'ORDER_NOT_FOUND' WHEN o.is_deleted = TRUE THEN 'ORDER_DELETED' WHEN o.status NOT IN ('DRAFT', 'SUBMITTED') THEN 'ORDER_NOT_EDITABLE' WHEN p.id IS NULL OR p.is_deleted = TRUE THEN 'PRODUCT_NOT_AVAILABLE' WHEN c.id IS NULL THEN 'CATEGORY_NOT_AVAILABLE' WHEN p.unit_price <> #{unitPriceSnapshot} THEN 'UNIT_PRICE_MISMATCH' WHEN c.tax_rate <> #{taxRateSnapshot} THEN 'TAX_RATE_MISMATCH' ELSE 'OK' END AS check_result FROM locked_order o LEFT JOIN locked_product p ON p.id = o.product_id LEFT JOIN locked_category c ON c.id = p.product_category_id ), updated_order AS ( UPDATE orders o SET order_amount = #{orderAmount}, total_cost = #{totalCost}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP FROM target_order t WHERE o.id = #{id} AND t.check_result = 'OK' ) SELECT COALESCE((SELECT check_result FROM target_order), 'ORDER_NOT_FOUND')
UPDATE orders SET is_deleted = true, deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = false RETURNING
